title: commersonia magniflora
intro: Commersonia magniflora, also known as the Quandong or native peach, is a deciduous shrub native to the deserts of central Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Commersonia magniflora include its ability to support heart health, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Commersonia magniflora can be made into a juice, tea, or powder, and are often used to support overall well-being and promote healthy aging.
